took: One-question-at-a-time interview methodology; agent recommends an answer for each; prefer codebase exploration over asking when the answer is in the code.
Three-criteria rule for ADRs (hard-to-reverse + surprising + real trade-off); discipline of offering ADRs sparingly; CONTEXT.md compatibility stub format; challenge-against-glossary discipline.
Atomic-claim lifecycle (@draft -> @spec -> @implemented); the .facts file format; idea that resolved decisions should be short, structured, and ideally machine-verifiable rather than freeform prose.
